si.t: Note: Check Mandatory Fields has data before submission
Reporting Member ID should be 10 digit alphanumric value (As assigned by CIBIL e.g. BN09870001)
Consumer Name should be name and surname

r.t: Code given in guideline (Refer Annexure " " Page no " " of TUDF Guide attached)

si.t: Pincode: Should be 6 digit and should fall between series mentioned in TUDF Guide Page num.

r.t: Current/New Member Code,Current/New Member Short Name

si.t: Curr/New Account No:Maximum length 25 Must contain the account number assigned by the member to the borrower.

r.t: Code given in guideline (E.g. For Credit Card its 10.)

si.t: Date Opened/Disbursed: DDMMYYYY account opening date (E.g. 31122004)
Date Reported: DDMMYYYY last month date
High Credit/Sanctioned Amt: Maximum length 9 ,Approve loan amount
Current Balance: Maximum length 10, current balance of loanee

r.t: File name : <REPORTING MEMBER ID should be 10 digits> - <Data type>-<data cycle upload date in DDMMYYYY>-<Date of file creation in DDMMYYYY format> - <File creation time in HHMMSS format>.txt or.xls

si.t: do not edit or change header name of excel format, kindly use format as it is.
Numerical values should be in whole numbers except for Rate of Interest column in TL segment
Key words to be avoided in production data submission file name.
uat | bcc | lbcc | trigger | advisor | batch | enquiry | rfcu | issue | olm | .part | outbox | test | ANNEXURE | Suit | scrub | .png | .xls | .xlsx | .pdf | .dsv | .tuef | .doc
